mapper.select: select * from content_help_doc where deleted = 0 and publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' order by sort_no asc, publish_time desc, id desc
select * from content_help_doc where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from content_help_doc where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 and publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' limit 1
mapper.update: update content_help_doc set title = #{title}, doc_type = #{docType}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
